items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• Do you want cold or hot milk?
• How many books about dogs do you have at home?
• What do you want to buy downtown?
• 1- How many brothers and sisters do you have? / teachers / friends
• 2- Do you prefer to work or study English tonight? / German / Chinese

items.text: Do you want cold or hot milk?
How many books about dogs do you have at home?
What do you want to buy downtown?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: E vão a igreja neste dia.
options: and go to church in this day 3.
and go to church in this day 2.
and go to church in this day.
day this in church to go and.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: As crianças americanas acreditam que
Choose the English sentence for: O Coelho da páscoa traz ovos de chocolate,

items.answer: 1- How many brothers and sisters do you have? / teachers / friends
2- Do you prefer to work or study English tonight? / German / Chinese
